reviews.comment:
Una parada para estirar las piernas,  tomar  y comer algo rico e ir al aseo. También tiene un recreo con mesas y bancos bajo los árboles  por si no se quiere entrar al establecimiento y descansar del viaje.

(Translated by Google)
A stop to stretch your legs, grab a bite to eat, and use the restroom. There's also a recreation area with tables and benches under the trees if you prefer not to go inside and want to rest after your trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5bEtqcmpRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre lleno de gente, buena atención,  se puede descansar y comer algo al venir de la costa si saliste temprano

(Translated by Google)
Always full of people, good service, you can rest and eat something when coming from the coast if you left early
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5dmFmdXRBRRAB
